name: Cape Breton Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients and stir in the raisins.
2. Blend the remaining ingredients (sour cream, oil, egg) with the flour mixture until combined.
3. Toss on a lightly floured surface until no longer sticky.
4. Divide the dough into two halves.
5. Pat each half of the dough into a 6-inch circle with a slightly rounded top.
6. Brush the tops with milk and sprinkle with sugar.
7. Cut each circle into 6 wedges.
8. Place the wedges about 2 inches apart on a cookie sheet.
9. Bake at 425°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Serve hot with butter and jam or flavored butter or honey.
